ogTitle: Cumnock vs Cundle Flat: Climate Safety

heading: Cumnock vs Cundle Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cumnock, New South Wales and Cundle Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cundle Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Cumnock (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cumnock or Cundle Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cumnock has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Cundle Flat scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cumnock scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Cundle Flat scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cumnock or Cundle Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cundle Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
